title: Lille, Hauts-de-France — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Lille, Hauts-de-France: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Lille is a city in Hauts-de-France with a population of 234,000. A dynamic northern city with Flemish influences, a thriving art scene, and excellent connections to London and Brussels.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
